title: Ubiquiti UniFi switch Flex 2.5G PoE
description: The Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Flex 2.5G PoE is a compact switch designed to expand networks in home and office environments, particularly for connecting powered devices. It features 8x 2.5Gbit ports with PoE 802.3af/at/bt (POE++ 60W) support , enabling seamless integration of devices with higher data transfer rates, such as modern access points, servers, or NAS storage systems. The total PoE budget reaches up to 196W when powered by a power adapter. If the switch is powered via PoE, the PoE budget… The uplink is a combo 10G RJ45 / SFP+ port. One of its key features is Power over Ethernet support, allowing the device to be powered directly via the network cable using PoE input on the uplink port (90W 802.3bt / POE+++), or alternatively via the 54V DC / 3.9A adapter (not included in the box). Although the uplink port is a combo port, you can use just one port or leverage the RJ45 port for power and the optical port for data simultaneously With its minimalist design, it is ideal for placement on a desk or wall mounting. Using an optional kit, DIN rail mounting is also possible. It is fully compatible with UniFi products and allows for easy scaling as needed. Managing the device requires the UniFi Network application v9.0.108 or newer Device Drilling Template Wall Mount Bracket Mounting Kit
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (8) 100/1000/2500 Mbps + (1) 10G RJ45/SFP+ Optical interfaces (1) 1/10Gbps Combo Power Power type PoE, DC connector PoE type PoE-Out + PoE-In PoE-Out standards 802.3af, 802.3at, 802.3bt PoE Out ports 8 PoE budget [W] 196 Max. power consumption [W] 14 Power via connector/terminal 54V DC Physical characteristics Design On the wall, Desktop Fans No Chassis design Plastic Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 20 up to 45 Width [mm] 213 Height [mm] 34 Depth [mm] 99 General Switchning capacity [Gbps] 60 Packet forwarding rate [Mpps] 44
